case_title: MARTINOVICH, JAYSON vs. AUTO CHLOR SYSTEM et al

NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC TO PLTF MARTINOVICH JAYSON. HEARING SET FOR FEB-07-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID.
